title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: The Smiling Forehead
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: By forehead is meant man's expression. The smiling forehead is the pleasant expression; it depends solely upon man's attitude to life. Life is the same for the saint and for Satan, and if men are different it is because of their outlook on life. The same life is turned by the one into heaven and by
